category_sources: source_facts.description says it manages Procfile-based applications; official foreman manual describes running and exporting Procfile process groups.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is foreman; official manual title uses Foreman.
docs_sources: Official homepage is a hosted foreman(1) manual and is the dedicated documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/ddollar/foreman; per instruction, repo is not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists foreman; source_facts.description and official manual describe Procfile application process management.
